creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 154881
adding CPE information to Makefile

devel/log4net has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2006-0743). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
